case_title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF VS DYMALLY TAMMY AKA HUSSEY TAMMY et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT DYMALLY GARY $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $1,393.15 INTEREST, $14.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,407.65 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO BUREAU OF DELINQUENT REVENUE AS TO DEFENDANT DYMALLY TAMMY AKA HUSSEY TAMMY DYMALLY GARY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-13-1992 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 04
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT DYMALLY GARY
